info.english_meaning: to take out to extract to examine a metal to investigate purity of a metal
info.hindI_arTa: bAhara nikAlanA ragaq0a ke nikAlanA kasOwI para Gisake sone Adi kI parIkzA karanA

upasargachandrika.example_text: '(tAn) gfDrA ruzA mama kuzantyaDidaRqanetuH' (BA0 pu0 31610) kuzanti=kuzRanti=nizkarzanti (AntrARi)
'koSaH kuzRAteH vikuzito Bavati' (ni0 526) viviDaM kuzito vikuzitaH suziratvAt
'kulaM kuzRAteH vikuzitaM Bavati' (ni0 6224) vikuzitaM vistIrRaM tataM praTitam
'SaSvaditi vicikitsArTIyo BAzAyAm' (ni0 15) vicikitsA niScaya iti maheSvaraH
